allow: Bash(git init && git add -A && git status)

Bash(for f in \\
  "src/lib/eas/contracts.ts" \\
  "src/lib/eas/encode.ts" \\
  "src/lib/eas/operations.ts" \\
  "src/lib/eas/config.ts" \\
  "src/lib/eas/index.ts" \\
  "src/app/setup/page.tsx" \\
  "src/app/api/farcaster/route.ts" \\
  "src/components/publish-button.tsx" \\
  "src/components/attest-button.tsx" \\
  "src/components/farcaster-verify.tsx" \\
  "src/lib/identity.ts" \\
  "src/contexts/ottp-context.tsx" \\
  ".env.local" \\
  ".npmrc" \\
  "tsconfig.json"; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "EXISTS: $f"; else echo "MISSING: $f"; fi
done)
Bash(which brew 2>&1 && brew install gh 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(git rm --cached src/components/register-prompt.tsx 2>/dev/null; git add .npmrc README.md src/app/api/farcaster/route.ts src/components/farcaster-verify.tsx src/lib/identity.ts src/app/page.tsx src/app/o/[id]/page.tsx src/app/s/[id]/page.tsx src/components/dashboard.tsx src/components/header.tsx src/components/object-card.tsx src/contexts/ottp-context.tsx .env.example .claude/settings.local.json)

Bash(git add .npmrc README.md "src/app/api/farcaster/route.ts" src/components/farcaster-verify.tsx src/lib/identity.ts src/app/page.tsx "src/app/o/[id]/page.tsx" "src/app/s/[id]/page.tsx" src/components/dashboard.tsx src/components/header.tsx src/components/object-card.tsx src/contexts/ottp-context.tsx .env.example .claude/settings.local.json)

Bash(git add .npmrc README.md .gitignore .env.example "src/app/api/farcaster/route.ts" src/components/farcaster-verify.tsx src/lib/identity.ts src/app/page.tsx "src/app/o/[id]/page.tsx" "src/app/s/[id]/page.tsx" src/components/dashboard.tsx src/components/header.tsx src/components/object-card.tsx src/contexts/ottp-context.tsx .claude/settings.local.json && git status)
